name: Heavenly Potato Gratin
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 400°F. Peel the garlic and split it into cloves.
Rub the sides of the gratin pan with the garlic cloves and leave them in the pan.
Slice the potatoes paper-thin. Do not soak them in water at any time.
Layer 1/3 of the potato slices in the gratin dish and sprinkle evenly with the cheese, salt, and pepper to taste. Pour 1/3 of the stock over.
Repeat layering two more times.
Press the top layer into the liquid using a spatula.
Bake for approximately 1 1/2 hours, or until the potatoes are tender, the liquid has cooked down to a thick sauce, and the top is brown and crusty.
